Bashkir State Medical University, Russia

In 1932, Bashkir State Medical University commonly referred to as BSMU, was founded in Ufa which is in Russia and has become one of the nations oldest medical schools.

  • By Altas Mentor
  • University In Russia
  • January 25, 2025
  • Home
  • Russia
  • Bashkir State Medical University, Russia
# Russia

Bashkir State Medical University, Russia

In 1932, Bashkir State Medical University commonly referred to as BSMU, was founded in Ufa which is in Russia and has become one of the nations oldest medical schools. Currently, university is widely regarded as one of the best public universities in the country which offer’s a variety of courses in medicine, dentistry, and pharmacy. Many Indian students are choosing to study at BSMU because of the great academic reputation the country holds coupled with affordable fees.

Students who study at the university are able to fully tackle the world of medicine, as BSMU combines modern education techniques with experienced faculty, latest infrastructure, and a strong focus on research and innovation. BSMU has numerous extra curricular activities including sports, cultural events, and student clubs that allow young adults to fulfill to unleash their creativity and fully enjoy life. The institution also has a large library, several sports centers, and comfortable hostels, adding to the warm environment the university promotes.

Quick Highlights About Bashkir State Medical University, Russia

Year of Establishment1932
University TypeGovernment
RecognitionNMC and WHO approved
Eligibility50% in Physics, Chemistry and Biology Aggregate
Course Duration6 Years
NEETYes , compulsory
IELTS/TOFELNot Required
Medium of TeachingEnglish

Get Call Back from Atlas Mentor Counsellors

Why Choose Bashkir State Medical University, Russia?

For students seeking high quality medical schooling in a supportive and globally recognized environment, Bashkir State Medical University (BSMU) is one of the best options to consider.

Affordable Education BSMU provides education of medical professionals of the highest level at an affordable price. International students will find it cost effective to study here as the health profession education fees and accommodation costs are quite low as compared to many other nations.

Recognized Globally BSMU, one of the first medical universities in Russia established back in 1932, is listed in the directories of the most prominent medical organizations such as WHO and the Indian NMC, meaning a BSMU graduate will be accepted internationally.

Quality Education and Practical Training At this university, students will find modern facilities, well trained lecturers, and developed labs. Students also practice medicine during their internships and clinical rotations in top medical facilities.

Student-Friendly Environment BSMU students can take advantage of the superb amenities including well-equipped hostels, ample amount of literary resources, sports and cultural clubs. The institution itself is very friendly towards students from other countries.

Career Support The university BSMU provides career support services such as career consultations, placement on internships, as well as looking for mentors in the alumni community that had a successful path in medicine.

If you’re looking for an all rounded education institution that has good living conditions, easily affordable, and promotes customer care, BSMU is the right fit for you.

The following is the fee structure for Bashkir State Medical University, BSMU for 2024

Tuition Fees : 2,99,244 ₽ per year, across all 6 years 

Hostel Fees : 15,000 ₽ per year, across all 6 years

Total Fees : 3,14,244 ₽ per year across all 6 years

1 RUB = ₹0.93 (approx).

This is comparative cheap for international students trying to achieve a medical degree in Russia.

Eligibility Criteria of Bashkir State Medical University, Russia

In order to get Bahskir State Medical University BSMU, Russia, students need to meet a few age and academic requirements which will ensure that they can cope with the medical education.

Education Qualification

For admission to BSMU, one must be done with their high secondary education, which is 12th standard or its equivalent.

Those willing to take admission should have Physics, Chemistry and Biology (PCB) as their main 12th grade subjects.

The minimum required marks in PCB are

50% for General category students.

40% for SC/ST students.

In addition, as the medium of teaching for international students is english, working proficiency is essential.

NEET Required Score

Indian students who wish to attend BSMU for the MBBS or BDS programme need to clear the National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET).

As per the guidelines of the National Commission for Medical Colleges in India, it is important to sit for NEET if you want to study medicine elsewhere.

Certain Age Criteria

The age at which a person can be admitted is 17 years.

Provide evidence that you were, at least, 17 years old on or before 31st December of the admission year.

FMGE Examinations

In case, the students are involved in clinical programs excluding the MBBS or BDS degrees, they may need to take the Foreign Medical Graduate Examination (FMGE) based on their goals and licensure needs.

Supportive Documentation

All pupils attending these universities should possess a passport and other relevant documentation in order to gain admission.

Students need to confirm they are alright and fit since some universities will ask for a medical fitness certificate together with the admission application.

These requirements are set so that international students and Indians will not have trouble getting admission into BSMU because there are academic and legal criteria one has to fulfill before obtaining a medical degree.

Hostel Facilities at Bashkir State Medical University, Russia

BSMU provides its students with hostel facilities, ensuring students feel at home, comfortable and everything is within reach. Here’s an overview of what students can expect

Accommodation Options

Students can choose between single rooms, two occupant rooms and dorms.

Rooms are furnished with basic necessities like beds, desks, chairs, and wardrobes. Some rooms also have en-suite bathrooms.

Common Facilities

There is also a kitchen and dining hall for students’ use, as well as a communal area to do laundry.

Students can relax and spend time with friends in the recreational areas available in the hostel.

Additional Amenities

The university hostels are also equipped with sports amenities like gymnasiums and swimming pools, ensuring that students live an active and healthy life.

Students can also access their daily needs at ATMs, canteens, and cafeterias located on the campus or in its proximity.

Security and Comfort

Each hostel is in close proximity to the academic buildings, ensuring that attending classes is not cumbersome for students.

The hostels provide a safe and welcoming environment with 24/7 security, allowing students to truly focus on their studies while feeling secure.

BSMU strives to create a friendly view in its parallel programs and its hosting facilities so that scholars from other countries are able to concentrate on their academic work and still live a well rounded life.

Ranking of Bashkir State Medical University, Russia

The ranking for Bashkir State Medical University (BSMU) is stated below:

Country Ranking : 208th In Russia

World Ranking : 5677th

It is evident from the provided information that the university has a strong localization focused reputation for medical teaching, learning, and research. Although, BSMU is not the most highly regarded school in the world, it has a decent reputation in Russia and is sought after by international students, particularly from India.

Placement at Bashkir State Medical University, Russia

For graduates of the university, especially for those studying medicine, BSMU does have an excellent placement. This is how the university assists with these skills

Career Counseling

BSMU offers career counseling for the sake of the students who are still not sure what carrer they want to pursue.

Internship Programs

The university runs internship programs for the students, where they can work at hospitals and other health care institutions which helps them acquire the necessary skills.

Alumni Network

Students who graduated from BSMU can leverage its strong alumni network to get support for securing job positions and to get advice in their shift to professional work. Now, numerous graduates hold positions in prestigious hospitals and clinics across the globe.

Global Recognition

With a degree from BSMU, graduates can practice all over the world as BSMU degrees are accepted internationally, including in India which facilitates employment opportunities outside the country.

While placement is dependent on a student’s individual performance and the local job market, BSMU career support services along with international recognition of its degree provide a solid basis for advancement in the medical field.

Education Loan for Indian Students

Indian students with aspirations to study abroad such in Bashkir State Medical University (BSMU) can get an education loan to subsidize their tuition and other living expenses. Here are a few steps necessary to start the application process

Loan Amount

Tuition fees, living, travel, and other related costs can all be covered with education loans.

The loan amount depends on the bank or financial institution and can range from ₹10 to ₹30 lakhs or more depending on the course and university.

Eligibility Criteria

Admission Letter An admission letter from BSMU or any other recognized institution is a must.

NEET Score A favorable NEET score is a necessity for medical loan applicants.

Co-Applicant Almost all loans have co-borrower eligibility, which means any parent or guardian willing to act as a financial guarantee.

Income Proof Income qualification of the co-borrower as well as their stability are taken into consideration.

Required Documents

  • BSMU Admission Letter
  • 12th Grade Marksheets
  • NEET scorecard
  • Co-Applicant’s income proof
  • Passport and visa
  • Collateral (property or assets)
  • Interest and Repayment

The repayment period is vastly different from one banking institution to another, however, it generally falls between 5 and 10 years.

Interest on educational loans vary based on the category, but the range pre-determined by the bank is usually between 10% to 15%.

Subsidies and Schemes

Some banks provide subsidized education loans with respect to government schemes for students going abroad with a limited repaying capacity.

It is always encouraged to consult with their bank for some additional reliefs like Moratorium Period.

It is better to arrive at the bank ahead of time, collect all the relevant papers, and check other loan options to pick the most favorable one. Academic advisors or the institution might also assist you in this procedure.

FAQs on Bashkir State Medical University, Russia

Here are the most common questions regarding Bashkir State Medical University (BSMU) Russia that may give you an insight into the requirements and details of their admission procedure, course offerings, and services available.

What can students study at Bashkir State Medical University and which programs are offered?

BSMU offers postgraduate and undergraduate diplomas for interested in MBBS, Dentistry, Pharmacy and related majors. With an emphasis in medicine, the college offers diplomas and degrees.

How much does it cost to study at Bashkir State Medical University?

Students pay an approximate fee of 2, 99, 244 roubles a year for BSU medical university for all the six years. Hostel charges are around 15,000 roubles every year so total expenses comes around to 3, 14, 244 roubles.

What is the eligibility criteria for Indian students wishing to attend the University?

Indian students are required to have passed their standard twelve with Biology in addition to Physic and Chemistry. Moreover, they should be having NEET qualification and must be 17 years old on 31st December of the year when he/she intends to take admission.

Do Indian students need to take NEET to get admission to medical programs at the University?

Yes, all Indian students planning to study and obtain their medical degree from Bashkir State Medical University need to take NEET.
